tldr_zh: OpenAI遭批評「沉默整代人」；Google衛星助防火災；伊朗襲擊約旦致美軍傷亡。
tldr_en: OpenAI criticized for silencing writers; Google wildfire satellites launch; Iran strikes Jordan, US troops killed.

items.title_zh: 作家艾格斯斥ChatGPT壓制文創工作者發聲
items.title_en: Dave Eggers Criticizes ChatGPT for Silencing Writers and Creatives
items.summary_zh: 知名作家Dave Eggers在OpenAI內部演講中警告，ChatGPT正在「沉默整整一代人」。艾格斯創辦過文學雜誌McSweeney's和多所支持藝術工作者的非營利機構，他以權威立場指出AI生成內容對創意產業工作者的威脅。
items.summary_en: Renowned author Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT is silencing an entire generation of writers and creatives. Having founded literary magazine McSweeney's and multiple nonprofits supporting the arts, Eggers brought credible concerns about AI-generated content's impact on creative professionals.

items.title_zh: 1Password為Claude新增受控登入功能強化AI安全
items.title_en: 1Password and Anthropic Partner to Enable Secure Claude Login Without Exposing Credentials
items.summary_zh: 1Password與Anthropic推出1Password for Claude，讓Claude在執行瀏覽器任務時可登入網站但無法獲取密碼。密碼與驗證碼由1Password保管，僅在任務需要時使用，不進入Claude的上下文或記憶。這創新方案在AI代理與安全之間找到平衡。
items.summary_en: 1Password and Anthropic launched 1Password for Claude, enabling the AI to log into websites for tasks while keeping passwords secure. Credentials remain with 1Password and are never exposed to the model or Anthropic's systems, striking a balance between AI agent functionality and security.

items.title_zh: Google推出開源3D表情符號助力數位設計創新
items.title_en: Google Open-Sources 3D Emoji for Creators Worldwide
items.summary_zh: Google在世界表情符號日分享其3D表情符號設計，並開放給創作者免費使用。從2D轉向3D表情符號需要考慮許多新的設計因素，Google此舉將推動3D設計工具的民主化。
items.summary_en: Google open-sourced its 3D emoji designs on World Emoji Day, making them available for creators to use in their projects. The transition from 2D to 3D emoji requires addressing new design considerations, democratizing 3D illustration tools.

items.title_zh: Google Pixel 11a傳搭旗艦級Tensor G6晶片扭轉頹勢
items.title_en: Google Pixel 11a Rumored to Feature Flagship Tensor G6 Processor
items.summary_zh: 根據洩露資訊，Google Pixel 11a將採用旗艦級Tensor G6晶片，而非前代Pixel 10a的G4。此舉反映Google修正過去在a系列上採用舊晶片的策略，料將提升中階機型的性能。
items.summary_en: Leaks suggest the Pixel 11a will feature the flagship-grade Tensor G6 processor, reversing Google's previous strategy of equipping the a-series with older chips. This marks a shift toward more competitive mid-range performance.

items.title_zh: Google支持衛星發動野火監測任務應對煙霾危機
items.title_en: Google-Backed FireSat Satellites Launch for Wildfire Detection Amid North American Smoke Crisis
items.summary_zh: Google支持的FireSat計畫發射衛星用於野火監測，能偵測其他衛星遺漏的火災。隨著美加地區煙霾惡化，該衛星群將助力防災機構更快發現並應對火災。
items.summary_en: Google-backed FireSat satellites have launched to detect wildfires that traditional satellites miss. Amid worsening smoke conditions across the US and Canada, these satellites will help disaster response teams identify fires faster.

items.title_zh: Waymo舊金山服務中斷後恢復電力故障凸顯自駕脆弱性
items.title_en: Waymo San Francisco Service Resumes After Power Outage Highlights Infrastructure Vulnerabilities
items.summary_zh: Waymo舊金山自駕車服務因電力中斷暫停約一小時後恢復。此事件再次說明停電對自駕車營運的影響，已非首次類似狀況發生。
items.summary_en: Waymo's San Francisco autonomous vehicle service resumed after a one-hour pause due to power outages. This incident highlights infrastructure vulnerabilities affecting self-driving operations, marking repeated disruptions from similar events.

items.title_zh: 美國聯邦員工可在公務手機安裝TikTok政策大轉彎
items.title_en: US Federal Employees Now Allowed to Download TikTok on Government Devices
items.summary_zh: 美國司法部宣布聯邦員工可在公務手機上下載TikTok，標誌著美國政府對這款中國應用的政策轉向。這一决策改變了過去對TikTok的限制立場。
items.summary_en: The US Department of Justice announced federal employees can now download TikTok on government devices, marking a policy reversal on the Chinese app. This decision reverses previous restrictions on the platform.

items.title_zh: 美國電動車充電基礎設施大幅改善六百里實測證實
items.title_en: 600-Mile Road Trip Proves EV Fast Charging Infrastructure in US Has Dramatically Improved
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch實測發現美國直流快速充電基礎設施性能大幅提升，充電速度與可靠性均有改善。這一進展為長途電動車出行的可行性提供實證支持。
items.summary_en: A 600-mile road trip demonstrates that DC Fast charging infrastructure in the US has significantly improved in speed and reliability. This development provides real-world validation for long-distance EV travel viability.

items.title_zh: 伊朗襲擊約旦美軍基地致兩死一失聯升級中東衝突
items.title_en: Iranian Strikes on Jordan Kill Two US Troops, One Missing in Escalating Middle East Tensions
items.summary_zh: 伊朗對約旦美軍設施發動飛彈與無人機攻勢，造成兩名美軍人員陣亡、一人失聯。中美伊關係持續緊張升級，雙方頻繁交換攻擊。
items.summary_en: Iran launched missile and drone strikes on US military facilities in Jordan, killing two American troops and leaving one missing. The attack marks further escalation in US-Iran hostilities across the Gulf region.

items.title_zh: 伊朗最高領袖指川普協議無效美伊停火陷僵局
items.title_en: Iran's Supreme Leader Says Trump's Ceasefire Agreement Is Worthless Amid Escalating Conflict
items.summary_zh: 伊朗最高領袖哈米尼發表書面聲明，指美國一再違反與伊朗達成的停火諒解備忘錄，批評川普簽名「毫無公信力」。此聲明反映伊朗對停火協議的不信任。
items.summary_en: Iran's Supreme Leader Hameini issued a statement claiming the US repeatedly violates the ceasefire memorandum signed with Iran, calling Trump's signature "completely worthless." The statement reflects Iran's distrust of the agreement.

items.title_zh: 俄烏戰爭持續伊朗襲擊以致美軍傷亡全球局勢緊張
items.title_en: Russia-Ukraine War Continues While US Faces Iran Strikes, Global Tensions Escalate
items.summary_zh: 烏克蘭無人機襲擊俄羅斯物流樞紐Wildberries設施，莫斯科與坦波夫地區多處倉庫遭轟炸。烏克蘭稱這些是供應「受制裁組件」的「主要後勤設施」。戰事對俄羅斯經濟與民生造成持續衝擊。
items.summary_en: Ukrainian drones struck Russian logistics hub Wildberries warehouses near Moscow and Tambov, with Ukraine calling them "major logistics facilities" supplying sanctioned components. The ongoing war continues to impact Russia's economy and civilian life.

items.title_zh: 北美地區抗議AI資料中心擴張至少125個美國城市響應
items.title_en: Nationwide Protests Against AI Data Center Expansion Coordinated Across 125+ US Locations
items.summary_zh: 美國至少125個地點計劃協調舉行抗議活動，反對AI資料中心快速擴張。人工智慧基礎設施的擴張在過去一年引發地方民眾不滿，此次是首次全國性協調行動。
items.summary_en: Coordinated protests against rapid AI data center expansion are planned across at least 125 US locations. Growing public opposition to AI infrastructure expansion has intensified local politics, marking the first nationwide coordinated action.

items.title_zh: 匈牙利總統簽署修憲案結束任期削弱奧班政治影響力
items.title_en: Hungary's President Signs Constitutional Amendment Ending Term, Weakening Orbán's Political Power
items.summary_zh: 匈牙利總統蘇尤克簽署新通過的憲法修正案結束其國家元首任期。蘇尤克被視為前民族主義總理奧班的盟友，此舉將削弱奧班在匈牙利政治中的影響力。
items.summary_en: Hungary's President Tamás Sulyok signed a constitutional amendment ending his presidential term. Seen as an Orbán loyalist, his departure weakens the former nationalist prime minister's political influence in Hungary.
